headline: Buy 5 Drone Technology Stocks to Boost Your Portfolio Returns in 2026
summary: LMT, NOC, ESLT, ADI and JBL stand out in drone tech for 2026, backed by strong growth, AI demand, and defense spending trends, which boost their outlook.
